title: Excited Shiba (Friday Meme)
summary: Wholesome 'is it Friday already?!' meme starring an over-the-moon Shiba Inu.
prompt: A wholesome meme image: a Shiba Inu dog with an exaggerated wide grin and sparkling cartoon eyes, paws raised excitedly, bright soft-yellow background with subtle confetti. Bold white impact-font caption with thin black outline: "I CAN'T BELIEVE IT'S FRIDAY ALREADY" across the top. Cute, friendly, not mean-spirited. Square format.
